name: Spam-Mac Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the elbow macaroni according to package directions; drain.
2. In a medium saucepan, melt margarine or butter over low heat.
3. Add chopped onion and cook until tender.
4. Stir in flour, Dijon mustard, and pepper. Gradually blend in milk, stirring constantly until thickened and bubbly.
5. Add shredded Swiss cheese; stir until melted.
6. Combine the cooked macaroni, Spam, peas, carrots, and cheese sauce in a 3-quart baking dish.
7. Top with bread crumbs.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for about 30 minutes, or until hot and bubbly. Serve 6 to 8 portions.
